ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the component was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the component details were last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Component status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_component_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the component type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* URL or path to an icon representing the component type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the characteristic belongs to */,
  "characteristic_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the characteristic type */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the characteristic */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the characteristic */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the characteristic */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the characteristic is measured */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the characteristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characteristics_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characteristics_characteristic_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("characteristic_type_id") REFERENCES characteristic_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characteristics_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES characteristic_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the revision belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Version number for the revision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_categories" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the relationship was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_subcategories" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the relationship was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id", "subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characteristic_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the characteristic type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characteristic_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)
